streamHealth.title: Stream Health
language.label: Language
auth.sessionExpiredLoginAgain: Your session has expired or you are not logged in. Please log in again.
appearance.tipAdaptiveThemes: 💡 Tip: Themes work in both light and dark modes with automatic color adaptation
appearance.previewText: This is how text looks on the background color
login.subtitle: Please sign in to continue
login.verificationHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. If this device is remembered, you may not be asked for this code on future logins.
login.enterAuthenticatorCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
login.changePasswordHint: You can change this password in Users after login
login.error.rateLimited: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
login.error.loggedOut: You have been successfully logged out.
login.error.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
login.error.authRequired: Authentication required. Please log in to continue.
login.error.enterUsernamePassword: Please enter both username and password
login.error.codeSixDigits: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits
login.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.error.mfaExpired: MFA session expired. Please login again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.adminOnly: System settings are only available to administrators.
settings.empty: No settings available. Please try again later.
settings.savedRestart: Settings saved. Restart required for runtime capacity changes.
settings.restartNotice: Restart LightNVR before runtime capacity changes take effect.
settings.restartExplanation: Until LightNVR restarts, the running instance keeps using the old stream capacity and thread pool.
users.deleteUserConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the user "{username}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.lockPasswordChangesHelp: When locked, this user cannot change their own password
users.allowedTagsHelp: Comma-separated stream tags. When set, this user can only see streams that share at least one matching stream tag. Leave blank to allow access to all streams.
users.allowedLoginCidrsHelp: One IPv4 or IPv6 CIDR per line. Comma-separated values are also accepted. Bare IPs are treated as a single host.
users.apiKeyShownOnce: This key will only be shown once. Save it securely.
users.generateApiKeyDescription: Generate a new API key for this user. This will invalidate any existing API key.
users.mfaDescription: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. You'll need an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
users.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
users.twoFactorEnabledSuccess: ✓ Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully!
users.mfaNowRequired: You will now be required to enter a verification code from your authenticator app each time you log in.
users.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to view the users list. Admin privileges are required.
users.errorLoadingUsersDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading users.
users.noUsersDescription: Click the "Add User" button to create your first user.
recordings.noRecordingsFoundMatchingCrit: No recordings found matching your criteria
recordings.selectAll: Select all recordings on this page
timeline.help.selectStreamAndDate: Select a stream and date — recordings load automatically
timeline.help.refineSelections: Use Refine Selections to go back and adjust your selection
timeline.help.positionCursor: Click on the timeline to position the cursor at a specific time
timeline.help.dragPlayhead: Drag the playhead to navigate precisely
timeline.help.clickSegment: Click a segment (coloured bar) to play that recording
timeline.help.arrowKeys: Use Left and Right arrow keys to jump between recordings; click the video to switch arrow keys to 1-second seeking
timeline.help.playFromCursor: Use the green play button to start playback from the current cursor position
timeline.help.zoomControls: Use the Fit, + and − buttons or Ctrl/Cmd + mouse wheel to zoom the timeline
timeline.help.panControls: Pan left/right at the current zoom level with Shift + mouse wheel or a horizontal trackpad scroll gesture
timeline.help.actions: Use Snapshot, Download, Protect or Delete on the currently playing recording
timeline.arrowKeysHelpTitle: Click the video to switch arrow keys to 1-second seeking. Click elsewhere to jump between recordings again.
timeline.inlineHint: Click video for 1s arrow-key seeking · Click timeline for recording-to-recording arrows · Shift+wheel pan · Ctrl/Cmd+wheel zoom
timeline.fullscreenNotSupported: Fullscreen mode is not supported in this browser.
timeline.cannotTakeSnapshotVideoNotLoade: Cannot take snapshot: Video not loaded
timeline.selectSegmentOrPlay: Click on a segment in the timeline or use the play button to start playback.
timeline.deleteRecordingConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this recording? This action cannot be undone.
system.restartServiceDescription: This will restart the NVR service
system.restartConfirmation: Are you sure you want to restart LightNVR? All active streams will be temporarily interrupted and will resume automatically after restart.
system.serverTakingLonger: Server is taking longer than expected. Please refresh manually.
system.clearLogsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to clear all logs? The log file will be permanently erased.
system.systemInformationUnavailable: System information not available. Please try again later.
system.versionsSummary: Runtime summary of the software LightNVR depends on.
system.versionInformationUnavailable: Version information is not available yet.
system.diskPressureWarningPrefix: ⚠ Disk pressure is {level}. Use cleanup buttons below to free space, or
system.runCleanupTitle: Delete recordings that have exceeded their configured retention period
system.forceFreeSpaceTitle: Delete oldest unprotected recordings regardless of retention settings — use when disk is full and normal cleanup won't free space
common.name: Name
live.cannotTakeSnapshotStreamNotIdentifi: Cannot take snapshot: Stream not identified
live.cannotTakeSnapshotVideoInvalidDimen: Cannot take snapshot: Video not loaded or has invalid dimensions
live.cannotTakeSnapshotVideoNotLoaded: Cannot take snapshot: Video not loaded
live.downloadFailedNoData: Download failed: No snapshot data available
live.downloadFailedCreateImageData: Download failed: Unable to create image data
live.forceRefreshWarning: This will briefly interrupt the go2rtc connection, breaking the active recording. The recording will resume automatically.
live.go2rtcNotRespondingRetry: go2rtc is enabled but not responding. Check go2rtc service status. Click Retry to try again.
live.go2rtcHlsFailedRetry: go2rtc HLS stream failed. Click Retry to try again.
live.hlsStreamingUnavailableBoth: HLS streaming unavailable - both go2rtc and native HLS failed
live.hlsNotSupportedModernBrowser: HLS is not supported by your browser - please use a modern browser
live.mseLowLatencyStreaming: MSE (Media Source Extensions) - Low latency streaming
live.webrtcConnectionLostRetry: WebRTC connection lost. Click Retry to reconnect.
live.streamConnectedNoVideoDataRetry: Stream connected but no video data. Click Retry to reconnect.
live.microphoneAccessDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.
live.noMicrophoneFound: No microphone found. Please connect a microphone.
live.disableStreamConfirm: Disable this stream? It will stop recording and streaming until re-enabled.
live.pauseForPrivacyConfirm: Pause this stream for privacy? Recording and live view will stop, but the stream will remain visible on this page with a privacy overlay. Click Resume when done.
streams.noStreamsConfiguredYetAdd: No streams configured yet. Click 'Add Stream' to create one.
streams.thisMayTakeAFewSeconds: This may take a few seconds.
streams.whatWouldYouLikeToDoWith: What would you like to do with "{streamName}"?
streams.chooseFollowingOptions: Please choose one of the following options:
streams.disableStreamExplanation: This option will disable the stream but keep its configuration in the database. You can re-enable it later.
streams.deleteStreamExplanation: This option will permanently delete the stream configuration from the database. This action cannot be undone.
streams.areYouSureDeletePermanent: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{streamName}"?
streams.streamDeleteCannotBeUndone: This action cannot be undone. The stream configuration will be permanently removed from the database.
streams.bulkDeleteExplanation: This will permanently remove the stream configurations. This action cannot be undone.
streams.bulkEnableExplanation: The selected streams will resume processing with their existing configurations.
streams.bulkDisableExplanation: The selected streams will stop processing. Their configurations are preserved and can be re-enabled later.
zoneEditor.title: Detection Zone Editor
zoneEditor.subtitle: Draw zones where you want to detect objects for {streamName}
zoneEditor.snapshotUnavailable: Snapshot unavailable - drawing on grid background
zoneEditor.noZonesDefined: No zones defined. Click "Draw Zone" and click on the canvas to create a zone.
streamsConfig.subtitle: Configure stream settings, recording options, and detection parameters
streamsConfig.streamNameImmutable: Stream name cannot be changed after creation
streamsConfig.urlCredentialsHiddenTitle: URL credentials are hidden in demo/viewer mode
streamsConfig.rtspUrlHelp: RTSP URL for the camera stream
streamsConfig.cameraAdminUrlHelpBefore: Optional. If set, LightNVR will show a launcher button in the streams list that opens this page in a new tab. Use a full
streamsConfig.streamTagsHelpBefore: Comma-separated stream tags for access control and dashboard filtering (e.g.
streamsConfig.streamTagsHelpAfter: Used for RBAC user permission restrictions.
streamsConfig.onvifCameraHelp: Enables motion detection and PTZ features
streamsConfig.onvifSettingsHelp: Enter credentials and connection settings for ONVIF features (motion detection, PTZ control). Leave empty if your camera doesn't require authentication.
streamsConfig.recordingScheduleOnly: Recording only during configured schedule windows
streamsConfig.recordAllVideoContinuously: Record all video continuously to disk
streamsConfig.restrictRecordingToSchedul: restrict recording to specific days & hours
streamsConfig.scheduleGridHelp: Click day/hour headers to toggle columns or rows. Drag across cells to paint a range.
streamsConfig.enableDetectionRecordingHe: Only record when AI detects objects (person, car, etc.)
streamsConfig.bothModesEnabledHelp: Continuous recording will run, and detection events will be logged and associated with the recordings.
streamsConfig.detectionOnlyModeHelp: Video will only be saved when detections occur, with pre and post buffers.
streamsConfig.noRecordingModeSelected: ⚠️ No recording mode selected. Video will not be saved to disk.
streamsConfig.audioSettingsHelp: Audio recording applies to both continuous and detection-based recordings (requires audio track in stream).
streamsConfig.ensureLightObjectDetectRun: Make sure light-object-detect is running on this endpoint
streamsConfig.customApiEndpointHelp: Enter the full URL to your custom detection API endpoint
streamsConfig.detectionThresholdHelp: Minimum confidence level to trigger recording (0-100%)
streamsConfig.objectFilterModeHelp: Filter which object types trigger detections for this stream
streamsConfig.includeObjectsHelp: Comma-separated list of object classes to detect (all others ignored)
streamsConfig.excludeObjectsHelp: Comma-separated list of object classes to ignore (all others detected)
streamsConfig.retentionDaysHelp: Days to keep regular recordings (0 = unlimited)
streamsConfig.detectionRetentionDaysHelp: Days to keep detection recordings (0 = unlimited)
streamsConfig.maxStorageMbHelp: Storage quota for this stream (0 = unlimited)
streamsConfig.detectionZonesHelp: Define specific regions where object detection should be active. This helps reduce false positives and focus on areas of interest.
streamsConfig.zoneTipConfigure: Click "Configure Zones" to draw detection regions on your camera view
streamsConfig.zoneTipDrawPolygons: Draw polygons by clicking points on the image
streamsConfig.zoneTipIgnoreAreas: Use zones to ignore areas like trees, roads, or sky
streamsConfig.zoneTipMultipleZones: Multiple zones can be configured for different areas
streamsConfig.onvifMotionRecordingHelp: Record when the camera's built-in motion detection triggers. Uses ONVIF events from the camera.
streamsConfig.enablePtzControlHelp: Enable pan-tilt-zoom controls for this camera via ONVIF PTZ protocol
streamsConfig.motionTriggerSourceHelp: Optional. Enter the name of another stream whose ONVIF motion events will trigger recording on this stream. Useful for dual-lens cameras where one lens provides motion events (e.g., fixed wide) and the other does not (e.g., PTZ). Leave empty to use this stream's own motion events.
streams.setStreamNameAndSaveBeforeTestin: Please set a stream name and save before testing motion.
streams.enableOnvifCameraFirst: Enable "ONVIF Camera" in Basic Settings first.
streams.noDevicesDiscoveredYet: No devices discovered yet. Click "Start Discovery" to scan your network.
streams.deviceAlreadyInUseTitle: This IP is already in use by an existing stream. Click to connect anyway.
streams.onvifAuthenticationHelp: Enter credentials to connect to the selected ONVIF device. Credentials are not needed for discovery, only for connecting to devices.
streams.enterNameForStream: Enter a name for this stream:
streams.streamNameHelp: This name will be used to identify the stream in the system.
settings.hlsStoragePathHelp: Optional path for HLS segments. If not specified, storage path will be used.
settings.enableGridViewThumbnailsHelp: Allow grid view with thumbnail previews on recordings page
settings.databaseBackupIntervalHelp: How often to flush, verify, and back up the SQLite database while the system is running. Set to 0 to keep startup/shutdown backups only.
settings.databaseBackupRetentionHelpBefo: How many timestamped backups to keep. Set to 0 to retain only the latest
settings.postBackupScriptHelp: Optional absolute path to an executable that runs after a verified backup. It receives: backup path, database path, and backup directory.
settings.threadPoolHelp: Number of libuv worker threads. Default is 2× the number of CPU cores (clamped 2–128).
settings.maxStreamsHelpBefore: Stream engine capacity — how many cameras can run simultaneously. Changing this requires a
settings.maxStreamsHelpAfter: Use the Streams page to add cameras up to this limit.
settings.demoModeHelp: Allow unauthenticated users to view streams (viewer access only)
settings.disableWebrtcHelp: When enabled, all streams will use HLS instead of WebRTC
settings.sessionIdleTimeoutHelp: How long a signed-in session may sit inactive before re-authentication is required.
settings.absoluteSessionLifetimeHelp: Hard cap for a session even if the user stays active. Should be greater than or equal to the idle timeout.
settings.rememberDeviceDaysHelp: How long a successfully MFA-verified device can skip the next TOTP prompt. Set to 0 to disable remembered devices.
settings.trustedProxyCidrsHelpAfter: when the immediate peer IP matches one of these CIDRs. Leave blank to ignore forwarded headers.
settings.setupWizardHelp: Resets the first-run wizard so it appears again on the dashboard.
settings.forceMfaOnLoginHelp: Require TOTP on untrusted devices. Users can still mark a device as trusted after a successful MFA verification.
settings.loginRateLimitingHelp: Limit login attempts to prevent brute force attacks
settings.maxLoginAttemptsHelp: Maximum failed login attempts before lockout (minimum 1)
settings.rateLimitWindowSecondsHelp: Time window in seconds for rate limiting (minimum 10 seconds, default 300 = 5 minutes)
settings.detectionBasedRecordingDescript: Configure detection-based recording for streams. When enabled, recordings will only be saved when objects are detected.
settings.motionDetectionDescription: Built-in motion detection is available without requiring any external models. Select "motion" as the detection model in stream settings to use this feature. You can configure the detection model for each stream in the Stream Settings page.
settings.optimizedMotionDetectionDescrip: A memory- and CPU-optimized variant of motion detection designed for embedded and low-power devices. When "motion" is selected as the detection model, this optimized implementation is used automatically on supported devices; no additional configuration is required.
settings.detectionModelsPathHelp: Directory where detection models are stored
settings.apiDetectionUrlHelp: URL of the external object detection API endpoint
settings.apiDetectionBackendHelp: Inference backend used by the detection API
settings.defaultPreDetectionBufferHelp: Seconds of video to keep before detection
settings.defaultPostDetectionBufferHelp: Seconds of video to keep after detection
settings.defaultBufferStrategyHelp: How pre-detection video is buffered. "Auto" selects the best strategy based on your setup.
settings.go2rtcIntegrationDescription: go2rtc provides WebRTC and HLS streaming. Changes require a restart to take effect.
settings.enableGo2rtcHelp: When disabled, go2rtc will not be started and HLS will connect directly to camera streams. This saves bandwidth for WiFi cameras but disables WebRTC live view.
settings.forceNativeHlsHelp: Use lightNVR's native FFmpeg-based HLS instead of go2rtc HLS for live view. Useful if go2rtc HLS has compatibility issues. WebRTC is not affected.
settings.enableStunHelp: Enable STUN for NAT traversal (needed for remote WebRTC)
settings.stunServerHelp: STUN server address for NAT traversal
settings.externalIpHelp: Optional: External IP for NAT (leave empty for auto-detect)
settings.mqttEventStreamingDescription: Publish detection events to an MQTT broker for integration with Home Assistant or other systems.
settings.enableMqttHelp: Stream detection events to MQTT broker
settings.brokerHostHelp: MQTT broker hostname or IP address
settings.retainMessagesHelp: Broker stores last message for new subscribers
settings.homeAssistantAutoDiscoveryDescr: Automatically register cameras and sensors in Home Assistant via MQTT discovery. Requires the same MQTT broker used by Home Assistant.
settings.enableHaDiscoveryHelp: Cameras and motion sensors appear automatically in Home Assistant
settings.discoveryPrefixHelp: Must match Home Assistant's MQTT discovery prefix (default: homeassistant)
settings.snapshotIntervalSecondsHelp: How often to publish camera snapshots (0 = disabled, max 300)
settings.webrtcTurnServerDescription: Configure a TURN relay server for WebRTC when direct peer-to-peer connections fail (e.g., behind restrictive NAT/firewall).
settings.enableTurnRelayHelp: Use TURN server for WebRTC relay when direct connection fails
settings.onvifDiscoveryDescription: Configure ONVIF camera discovery settings. Use CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24) or "auto" for automatic network detection.
settings.enableOnvifDiscoveryHelp: Automatically discover ONVIF cameras on the network
settings.discoveryIntervalSecondsRangeHe: How often to scan for cameras (30–3600 seconds)
